title: triteleia peduncularis
intro: Triteleia peduncularis, also known as the Pacific triteleia or Geyer's triteleia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the lily family and is native to the western coast of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Triteleia peduncularis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Triteleia peduncularis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
